package.name: hdas_msg
package.description: Message/service definitions vendored from the Galaxea R1 HDAS firmware (atc_standard-V2.0.4-20250516_21_53_33_aarch64_patch1/install/hdas_msg/share/hdas_msg). Extracted as plain .msg/.srv source and rebuilt here rather than copying the firmware's own compiled install artifacts, which are aarch64 binaries and won't run in this workspace's (x86_64) container. Must be named exactly "hdas_msg" so the generated message type (hdas_msg/msg/Imu) matches the real robot's type — galaxea_simulation's imu_hdas_translator.py depends on this for /hdas/imu_chassis parity.
